title: Crédit Agricole Launches EURXT Euro Stablecoin on Ethereum
summary: French banking giant Crédit Agricole, through its asset servicing arm CACEIS, has launched a euro-pegged stablecoin called EURXT on Ethereum. The initial issuance includes 20.02 million tokens, aiming to facilitate institutional investments and tokenized fund access.
body:
Crédit Agricole, through its asset servicing arm CACEIS, has launched a new euro-pegged stablecoin named EURXT on the Ethereum blockchain. This stablecoin is designed to provide a stable digital currency pegged 1:1 to the euro, ensuring minimal volatility for users. The initial issuance includes 20.02 million EURXT tokens, marking a significant entry into the stablecoin market by a traditional financial institution.

The EURXT stablecoin is primarily targeted at institutional investors and aims to facilitate easier access to tokenized funds and other digital assets. This move is part of a broader trend where traditional financial institutions are increasingly adopting blockchain technology to enhance their service offerings. Crédit Agricole's entry into the stablecoin space is expected to bring more credibility and stability to the market.

For everyday users, this development means increased accessibility to stable digital currencies backed by reputable financial institutions. It also paves the way for more seamless transactions and investments in tokenized assets, potentially lowering barriers to entry for institutional and retail investors alike. The EURXT stablecoin could become a preferred choice for those looking to hedge against cryptocurrency volatility while benefiting from the efficiency of blockchain technology.

Looking ahead, the success of EURXT will depend on its adoption by institutional investors and the broader crypto community. Users should watch for updates on the stablecoin's integration with various financial platforms and its potential expansion to other blockchain networks. As the market evolves, EURXT could become a key player in the stablecoin ecosystem, offering a reliable alternative to existing options.
twitterThread: French banking giant Crédit Agricole, via its asset servicing arm CACEIS, just launched EURXT, a euro-pegged stablecoin on Ethereum. 20.02 million tokens issued so far, targeting institutional flows.
EURXT is designed for institutional investors, aiming to make tokenized fund access easier. This is a big step for traditional finance embracing blockchain tech.

If you're looking for a stable digital currency with institutional backing, keep an eye on EURXT. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-01-crédit-agricole-launches-eurxt-euro-stablecoin-on-ethereum
standaloneTweet: Crédit Agricole's new EURXT stablecoin on Ethereum offers a euro-pegged digital currency for institutional investors. 20.02 million tokens issued—watch this space for stablecoin innovation!
